mapper.select: SELECT r.role_name FROM ai_user_roles ur INNER JOIN ai_roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.role_name ASC
SELECT CONCAT(u.userid, '(', u.username, ')') FROM ai_user_roles ur INNER JOIN ai_users u ON u.userid = ur.user_id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY u.userid ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) FROM ai_user_roles ur INNER JOIN ai_roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN ai_users u ON u.userid = ur.user_id WHERE r.role_name = #{roleName} AND u.enabled = true
